recommendations.title: Leprechaun Returns
recommendations.overview: A group of unwitting sorority sisters accidentally awaken the serial-killing Leprechaun after they build a sorority house on his hunting grounds.

recommendations.title: The Void
recommendations.overview: In the middle of a routine patrol, officer Daniel Carter happens upon a blood-soaked figure limping down a deserted stretch of road. He rushes the young man to a nearby rural hospital staffed by a skeleton crew, only to discover that patients and per

recommendations.title: V/H/S/94
recommendations.overview: After the discovery of a mysterious VHS tape, a brutish police SWAT team launches a high-intensity raid on a remote warehouse, only to discover a sinister cult compound whose collection of pre-recorded material uncovers a nightmarish conspiracy.
recommendations.director: Simon Barrett, Steven Kostanski, Chloe Okuno, Timo Tjahjanto, Jennifer Reeder, Ryan Prows

recommendations.title: The Untamed
recommendations.overview: A meteorite deposits an alien monster with strange powers near the home of an unhappy couple.

recommendations.title: Invasion of the Body Snatchers
recommendations.overview: A small-town doctor learns that the population of his community is being replaced by emotionless alien duplicates.

recommendations.title: The Visitor
recommendations.overview: An ancient intergalactic warrior arrives on Earth to put a stop to a demonic child's plot to reproduce Satan's next generation of evil.

recommendations.title: ABCs of Death 2
recommendations.overview: Taking all that was great from the first instalment, the movie aims to be a wilder, leaner, faster-paced and even more entertaining anthology this time around, with a new crop of award-winning, visionary filmmakers from around the globe.
recommendations.director: Jen Soska, Robert Morgan, Julian Barratt, Juan Martínez Moreno, Hajime Ohata, Bruno Samper, Jim Hosking, Rodney Ascher, Jerome Sable, Marvin Kren, Todd Rohal, Sôichi Umezawa, Chris Nash, Alexandre Bustillo, Alejandro Brugués, Dennison Ramalho, Wolfgang Matzl, Aharon Keshales, Julian Gilbey, Kristina Buožytė, Robert Boocheck, E.L. Katz, Julien Maury, Larry Fessenden, Bill Plympton, Lancelot Oduwa Imasuen, Sylvia Soska, Steven Kostanski, Erik Matti, Vincenzo Natali, Navot Papushado

recommendations.title: A Shaun the Sheep Movie: Farmageddon
recommendations.genres: Family, Comedy, Adventure, Animation, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: When an alien with amazing powers crash-lands near Mossy Bottom Farm, Shaun the Sheep goes on a mission to shepherd the intergalactic visitor home before a sinister organization can capture her.

recommendations.title: Elio
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Science Fiction, Adventure, Comedy
recommendations.overview: Elio, a space fanatic with an active imagination, finds himself on a cosmic misadventure where he must form new bonds with eccentric alien lifeforms, navigate a crisis of intergalactic proportions and somehow discover who he is truly meant to be.
recommendations.director: Adrian Molina, Domee Shi, Madeline Sharafian

recommendations.title: Project: ALF
